response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r4c3 is 0.10 below threshold at normal urgency; balanced policy permits sharing to 20% SoC floor, and reciprocal support stabilizes the islanded network during crisis.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=['r4c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded at 22.4% SoC with ~11 ticks autonomy. Community in crisis; r3c2 has reciprocated support. Prior deadlock belief outdated. Shift to balanced sharing to stabilize local network and rebuild trust. Will share down to 20% SoC floor to prevent grid collapse..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
